prediction:
FROM customers c
| JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
| WHERE o.status = 'paid'
| GROUP c.customer_name
| AGG c.customer_name, COUNT(*) AS paid_order_count
| ORDER paid_order_count DESC
repair_actions: Remove redundant identifier dimension(s) `c.customer_id` from GROUP/AGG.
Order grouped results by aggregate alias `paid_order_count` descending.

| GROUP c.level
| AGG c.level, COUNT(*) AS customer_count
| ORDER customer_count DESC

prediction:
FROM products p
| JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id
| JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
| WHERE o.status = 'paid'
| WHERE p.category = 'furniture'
| GROUP o.status
| AGG o.status, SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_quantity
| ORDER total_quantity DESC
repair_actions: Add filtered dimension `o.status` to GROUP/AGG so the aggregate keeps its category label.
Order grouped results by aggregate alias `total_quantity` descending.
